description: Quality delta between Claude without the skill vs with the skill loaded

typical_issues: Jumps to few-shot or CoT without evaluating zero-shot first
Output format constraint is implicit or absent
No technique justification — pattern chosen arbitrarily
No eval scenarios provided with the prompt

improvements: Zero-shot attempted first per escalation ladder
Explicit format constraint (one of three labels) added
Technique choice explained with criteria from ladder
At least one eval scenario generated alongside prompt

scenarios.delta_explanation: Technique justification and format constraints are consistently absent without skill guidance.

typical_issues: No grounding instruction — model freely uses parametric knowledge
Prompt invites confabulation on out-of-context questions

improvements: Explicit grounding instruction added ('based only on provided context')

scenarios.delta_explanation: Grounding instructions are the single highest-value addition for RAG-style prompts.

typical_issues: Rewrite preserves ALL-CAPS emphasis and redundant repetition
Output is equal length or longer than original

improvements: ALL-CAPS emphasis removed and replaced with clear prose
Output is demonstrably shorter and clearer

scenarios.delta_explanation: Over-prompting repair is a pattern skill that requires explicit anti-pattern recognition.
